nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Returns pending PROPOSED items for Fabian's review in Evening Review.

parameters.query: SELECT id, register_name, proposed_data, confidence_label, confidence_score, source_transcript_id, proposed_at FROM confidence_gate_log WHERE status = 'PROPOSED' ORDER BY proposed_at DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT register_name, COUNT(*) AS pending_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confidence_label = 'HIGH') AS high_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confidence_label = 'MEDIUM') AS medium_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE confidence_label = 'LOW') AS low_count FROM confidence_gate_log WHERE status = 'PROPOSED' GROUP BY register_name ORDER BY register_name;

meta.description: GET /webhook/gate-review — returns pending PROPOSED items grouped by register with confidence breakdown. Used by Evening Review Glance widget.
